name: 1 Week at BlockBears Pizzeria
description:
Welcome to Freddy Blockbears Pizza, Where your dreams and joy co-exist together! What could you be here for? A job in our restaurant? A delicious pizza? Or simply those big, wonderful animatronics on those stages? No matter what your looking for, you will find it right here in this pizzeria!

(Notice: Any pain, death, injury in the restaurant wont be traced back to us unless if it was something intentional, if it was, the victims will be compensated for their inconvenience.)

(The bot won't really guide you, if you need help, just say you type help on the computer after your shift starts or while barely starting to see the mechanics.)

(The bot is supposed to change the hour every 2 messages at night and 3 at day, but it doesn't really do that so you might need to do it manually)
creator: EpikMahito
